title: Baked Mediterranean Cod with Pilaf
description: A Mediterranean twist on traditional Italian cuisine, featuring baked cod and a flavorful pilaf side dish.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray.
Place cod fillets on the baking sheet and season with salt and pepper.
Drizzle olive oil over the cod and top with minced garlic.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
While the cod is baking, cook the flavorful pilaf mix according to package instructions.
Heat chicken broth in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped parsley to the saucepan and stir to combine.
To serve, place a cod fillet on top of a bed of pilaf and spoon some of the parsley-infused broth over the top.
